name: Dragon Horn Hunter
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>角</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>狩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>猟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
All Normal Monsters gain 200 ATK. You take no battle damage from battles involving Normal Monsters you control.

[ Monster Effect ] 
''The horns were needed to prepare a medicine for her village, suffering from a plague. Unknown to her, the dragons burned and trampled her village, once displaced from their den.''
pend_eff: All Normal Monsters gain 200 ATK. You take no battle damage from battles involving Normal Monsters you control.
flavor: The horns were needed to prepare a medicine for her village, suffering from a plague. Unknown to her, the dragons burned and trampled her village, once displaced from their den.
